hypothesis: If the six controllable parameters (bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, two distinct flow rates, KOH concentration, and total applied current density) are optimized by the closed-loop AdaCarbon Bayesian optimization with a silver nanoparticle–coated gas-diffusion electrode, then the reactor yield of the reactive carbon electrolyzer will be maximized relative to non-optimized experiments, and this improvement will persist under validation with mixed bicarbonate–carbonate electrolytes.
